figure: Figure 4: Overall performance of frozen multimodal configurations
validation_checks: Frozen experiment set E1-E5 is complete.
Frozen horizon set is exactly 1 h, 3 h and 6 h.
All 15 experiment-horizon combinations are unique and present.
Every mean and SD is based on five seeds.
All plotted rows belong to the frozen test split.
MAE means and SDs are finite and non-negative.
E1-E5 use the same test sample count within every horizon.
E5-versus-E1 relative MAE changes were calculated directly from horizon-matched source rows.
